title: Unnecessary and inconsistent requirement for parentheses in method call

features.name: zero-argument method call without parentheses
features.description: Code should include a zero-argument method call on an object using dot notation without parentheses (e.g., this.get_name or obj.get_name)
features.snippet:
virtual class c; virtual function string get_name(); return "C"; endfunction endclass
c obj; string s = obj.get_name;

features.name: zero-argument method call as function argument without parentheses
features.description: Code should include a zero-argument method call without parentheses passed as an argument to another function (e.g., inside $sformatf)

features.name: virtual function in virtual class with method call on this
features.description: Code should include a virtual class with a virtual function that is called on this without parentheses
